(DEVICE FILE: PCF8563TS_TSSOP8_65P300X300MM_P)

PACKAGE TSSOP8_65P300X300MM
CLASS IC
PINCOUNT 8

PINORDER PCF8563TS_TSSOP8_65P300X300MM_P CLKOUT 'I\N\T\' OSCI OSCO SCL SDA VDD VSS
FUNCTION G1 PCF8563TS_TSSOP8_65P300X300MM_P 7 3 1 2 6 5 8 4

PACKAGEPROP PART_NAME PCF8563TS
PACKAGEPROP VALUE PCF8563BMM/TR

END
